name: Whitehorse Gold Corp.
summary: Whitehorse Gold Corp. operates as a mineral exploration and development company. The company explores for silver, gold, lead, and zinc. Its principal property is the Skukum gold project comprising 1,051 mineral claims covering an area of approximately 170.3 square kilometers, including Mt. Skukum gold mine, the Skukum Creek and Goddell gold deposits, and other gold-silver zones, which hosts gold-silver mineral deposits located in the Yukon, Canada. The company was incorporated in 2019 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
